narrative:
Sharonville 1-B (precinct in Hamilton County) has 902 registered voters, with 58.6% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 17.7% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 23.6%, a modest Democratic lean of 5.9 percentage points.
